protein_name: Cell autonomous antagonist of the canonical Wnt signaling pathway. May activate a second Wnt signaling pathway that controls planar cell polarity. Belongs to the NKD family. Expressed in colon, heart, kidney, leukocyte, liver, lung, ovary, pancreas, placenta, prostate, skeletal muscle, small intestine and spleen. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
